mano_cua.result_summary: 视频播放页面因CORS错误无法加载（pipedapi.kavin.rocks阻止localhost:5173的请求），视频播放器和剧场模式按钮从未渲染。已成功切换为Light主题但无法测试剧场模式按钮在浅色主题下的可见性
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Video watch pages never load due to CORS errors. Light theme was successfully set (confirmed via Preferences and HTML style='background: #f0f0f0'). Trending page loads but /watch pages fail with CORS: 'Access to fetch at pipedapi.kavin.rocks/streams/{id} blocked by CORS policy'. Theater mode button never renders because video player components require API data. Result: unclear - target function inaccessible.
